## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Documentation update (`docs`)
- [ ] Build / CI change (`build`, `ci`)
- [ ] Test improvement (`test`)
- [ ] Refactoring (`refactor`)
- [ ] Breaking change (describe impact below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is rebased on latest `master`
- [ ] Build passes with the target preset (`gcc` / `clang` / `msvc`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`ctest --preset <preset>`)
- [ ] New code follows the project's style guidelines (`clang-format`, `clang-tidy`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] README / docs updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] License headers added to new source files
